title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Jinbe, Reiju, Pudding, Sanji, Big Mom, Luffy as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thank you, jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But why are you here on this island?!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Ah, yes. Well, my "Sun Pirates"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are also one of the crews under big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whaaa- AAAAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A. But... what about... isn't that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes. Rebellion. There's no going back now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WaHAH- HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the "unfinished business" you said you had to take care of on fishman Island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes. I just took care of it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're getting reports of screams from the prisoner's library! What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're as fast as ever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First things first! Gotta hide somewhere they can't find us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whoa... All of a sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm so hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can worry about your stomach even at a time like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy uses up three times as much energy as a normal person just existing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine! It's not like I said I wanted to eat anything!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm only going to eat food you make for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Anyway, thanks, jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: SANji proposed to me.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: I'm going to shoot him dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Things are looking really bad!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Both me and Sanji were tricked!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I gotta go tell him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Take care of Nami, okay, jinbe?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WhA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GyaA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy! Wait! The castle is crawling with strong enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy! Did you already forget what happened this morning! For crying out loud...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Informary

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You believe me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Of course. You'd never deceive me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But to think she went that far... pudding...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She did seem a little too good to be true... so I went sniffing around...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please tell

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was going to kill us all, marriage or not, from the beginning...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that stuff about marrying her just to save Luffy and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That never would have worked out anyway, would it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that I could smooth all this over by just sacrificing myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a joke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even our father, for all that he is... seems to have taken this situation a bit lightly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But it's for the better.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think the Germa should just die out, here and now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll just pretend I haven't heard a thing,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And let big mom's plans play out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell do you mean?! You'll die too, Reju!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: OH? Worrying about me, are we?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess that last memory of us is a bit troublesome, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no need to feel indebted just for me having saved you back then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember if I

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
